title: murtughas calycina
intro: Murtughas calycina, a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa, is a member of the Euphorbiaceae family and is also known as the cat's claw creeper or cat's claw vine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Murtughas calycina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its roots and leaves can be used to make a poultice or a tincture for topical application.
